notes:
Warmest Series A lead as of Oct 2024. Responded positively to Q3 metrics on Oct 15 — replied same night. Partner Sam Reiter will join Thursday deep-dive. Meridian typically moves fast once they see strong metrics. Priority: confirm the Thursday 3 PM slot today.

Context: Jason initially asked for updated cap table and Q3 revenue metrics on Oct 9. Maya replied Oct 15 with the docs. Jason's reply the same night is a strong signal.
